svg.text: Spring Boot Modular Monolith · Keycloak OIDC · PostgreSQL · Redis · Object Storage · Transactional Outbox · Kafka later
OAuth2 Resource Server · Branch-scoped AuthZ · SOLID · Clean/Hexagonal · Native SQL + Flyway
Async backbone: notification, audit, report, CRM
One deployable backend. Keycloak, Redis, PostgreSQL, Object Storage and Kafka are supporting infrastructure, not microservices.
